name: commit-check: 缺少 Co-Authored-By → 警告
commit-check: 包含 Co-Authored-By → 无警告

tool_input.command:
git commit -m 'fix bug

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code (claude-opus-4-6)'

name: commit-check: 非 commit 命令 → 透传
commit-check: Co-Authored-By 带 email 后缀 (系统默认错误格式) → 格式警告

tool_input.command:
git commit -m 'fix bug

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>'
